name: Agilysys Hospitality Technology API
what_it_does: Agilysys hospitality technology REST API for hotel property management (PMS), point-of-sale (POS), inventory and procurement, and activity management for hotels, resorts, casinos, and golf properties. Enables AI agents to manage guest reservation creation and modification for hotel reservation automation, handle hotel check-in and check-out processing for front desk workflow automation, access room inventory and rate management for revenue optimization automation, retrieve food and beverage POS order management for resort dining automation, manage activity and tee time reservation for golf and resort activity automation, handle procurement and inventory control for resort food and beverage cost management automation, access guest profile and preference management for personalized service automation, retrieve daily hotel statistics and night audit data for financial reporting automation, manage conference and event space booking for hotel group sales automation, and integrate Agilysys PMS with channel managers, OTA platforms, revenue management systems, and payment gateways for full hospitality ecosystem.
use_cases: Processing hotel reservations from booking automation agents
Managing check-in/check-out from front desk agents
Tracking F&B orders from resort dining agents
Booking tee times from golf resort agents
not_for: Small independent B&B and boutique hotel (use Cloudbeds or Mews)
best_when: A hotel, resort, casino, or golf property wanting AI agents to automate reservations, front desk operations, F&B POS, activity booking, and procurement within Agilysys as the integrated hospitality management platform.
avoid_when: PCI-DSS PAYMENT CARD DATA HANDLING IN RESERVATION FLOW: Automated hotel reservation processing via Agilysys must route payment card data through Agilysys-integrated PCI-compliant tokenization; automated storage or logging of raw payment card data in reservation workflow creates PCI-DSS scope violation. NIGHT AUDIT CLOSE TIMING FOR FINANCIAL ACCURACY: Agilysys hotel night audit close locks previous business day transactions; automated financial data extraction must occur after night audit completion; automated pre-audit financial reports contain incomplete business day data creating inaccurate revenue reporting. ADA ACCESSIBILITY ROOM ASSIGNMENT FOR AUTOMATED CHECK-IN: Automated room assignment for hotel check-in must enforce ADA accessible room assignment for guests who requested accessible accommodation; automated room assignment bypassing ADA request creates ADA Title III civil rights liability.

auth.notes: Agilysys uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Alpharetta, Georgia HQ (Agilysys, Inc., NASDAQ: AGYS). Founded 2000 (hospitality tech division). Public company. $230M+ annual revenue. Resort, casino, golf, and full-service hotel focus. PMS: Agilysys Stay, POS: Agilysys Eatec/InfoGenesis, Activity: Agilysys Book, Procurement: Agilysys Eatec. Large resort and casino customers: Marriott, Hyatt, MGM Resorts, Wynn. Competes with Oracle OPERA, Infor HMS, and Springer-Miller for resort and casino hospitality.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per property with module licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per property; PMS, POS, activity, and procurement modules priced separately; implementation and support services
pricing.notes: Alpharetta GA. Agilysys NASDAQ:AGYS. $230M+ revenue. Resort, casino, golf focus. Per-property annual subscription with module licensing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; reservation and POS queries throttled; webhooks for reservation events

known_agent_gotchas: NIGHT AUDIT DEPENDENCY FOR ACCURATE FINANCIAL EXTRACTION: Agilysys PMS night audit close is required before previous business day financial data is accurate; automated M3 or accounting system integration must wait for night audit completion notification before extracting revenue data; pre-audit financial extraction creates revenue reporting with open folios and incomplete charges

ADA ACCESSIBLE ROOM ASSIGNMENT ENFORCEMENT IN AUTOMATED CHECK-IN: Automated room assignment during digital check-in must honor ADA accommodation requests in guest profile; automated room upgrade or reassignment without ADA compliance check creates ADA Title III civil rights violation exposure for hotel operator

PCI-DSS TOKENIZATION FOR PAYMENT IN RESERVATION WORKFLOW: Automated reservation creation and modification with payment guarantee must use Agilysys integrated payment tokenization; automated logging or caching of raw card data in reservation workflow code creates PCI-DSS cardholder data environment scope; implement Agilysys payment token reference only

Multi-module API integration complexity — Agilysys has separate APIs for Stay (PMS), InfoGenesis (POS), Book (activities), and Eatec (procurement); integrated resort automation requires understanding which Agilysys module owns each data domain and using corresponding API; cross-module data consistency (charge routing from POS to PMS folio) requires integration architecture understanding

Rate plan and restriction configuration complexity — Agilysys rate management includes BAR, negotiated, package, and promotional rates with restriction and minimum stay rules; automated rate selection for OTA channel management must apply correct restriction logic; automated rate delivery ignoring minimum stay or closed-to-arrival restrictions creates OTA reservation acceptance for non-available inventory

Casino loyalty integration for gaming resort properties — Agilysys implementations at casino resorts integrate with casino management systems (CMS) for loyalty point posting and complimentary (comp) room allocation; automated comp room management requires casino CMS integration separate from Agilysys PMS API; loyalty and comp workflows are outside standard Agilysys REST API scope
agent_readiness.security_notes: Hospitality PMS/POS. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA/AU/IN. Guest PII and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Resort and hotel PMS/POS. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. Global. Guest PII and payment card data.
